urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Kyiv
latest.summary: Russia has conducted a significant ballistic missile attack on Kyiv, resulting in one death and at least 14 injuries. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described this as one of the most extensive attacks on the city since the invasion began.
latest.details: Russia has conducted a significant ballistic missile attack on Kyiv, resulting in one death and at least 14 injuries. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described this as one of the most extensive attacks on the city since the invasion began. The Ukrainian military reported that their air defenses successfully intercepted 18 out of 41 missiles and 108 drones. In retaliation, Ukraine targeted Russian oil tankers in the Black Sea, further escalating the conflict.
latest.full_brief: Russia has conducted a significant ballistic missile attack on Kyiv, resulting in one death and at least 14 injuries. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky described this as one of the most extensive attacks on the city since the invasion began. The Ukrainian military reported that their air defenses successfully intercepted 18 out of 41 missiles and 108 drones. In retaliation, Ukraine targeted Russian oil tankers in the Black Sea, further escalating the conflict.

latest.title: Tate brothers arrested in US as further UK charges take total to 59
latest.summary: The UK's Crown Prosecution Service announced that Andrew Tate faces seven new counts of rape and charges related to sex trafficking. Tristan Tate is charged with two counts of rape and three counts of facilitating trafficking for sexual exploitation.
latest.details: The UK's Crown Prosecution Service announced that Andrew Tate faces seven new counts of rape and charges related to sex trafficking. Tristan Tate is charged with two counts of rape and three counts of facilitating trafficking for sexual exploitation. The total number of charges against the brothers has now reached 59. Following their arrest in the US, prosecutors will initiate extradition proceedings to bring them back to the UK.
latest.full_brief: The UK's Crown Prosecution Service announced that Andrew Tate faces seven new counts of rape and charges related to sex trafficking. Tristan Tate is charged with two counts of rape and three counts of facilitating trafficking for sexual exploitation. The total number of charges against the brothers has now reached 59. Following their arrest in the US, prosecutors will initiate extradition proceedings to bring them back to the UK.

latest.title: Cuban dissident Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara goes into exile in US
latest.summary: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba.
latest.details: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba. Otero Alcántara was arrested during significant anti-government protests in 2021. His case has contributed to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the US and Cuba.
latest.full_brief: Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, a prominent Cuban dissident, has gone into exile in the US after serving a five-year prison sentence. He is the leader of the San Isidro Movement, which advocates for freedom of speech and democracy in Cuba. Otero Alcántara was arrested during significant anti-government protests in 2021. His case has contributed to ongoing diplomatic tensions between the US and Cuba.

latest.title: Victoria announces new social media ‘demasking’ powers for accounts accused of vilification
latest.summary: Victoria is proposing new laws that would allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children online by lowering the legal threshold for suing platforms for negligence.
latest.details: Victoria is proposing new laws that would allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children online by lowering the legal threshold for suing platforms for negligence. The Victorian civil and administrative tribunal would gain 'demasking' powers under these proposed changes. The government insists that these laws will be introduced as a priority despite opposition skepticism.
latest.full_brief: Victoria is proposing new laws that would allow social media platforms to identify anonymous users accused of vilification. The reforms aim to protect children online by lowering the legal threshold for suing platforms for negligence. The Victorian civil and administrative tribunal would gain 'demasking' powers under these proposed changes. The government insists that these laws will be introduced as a priority despite opposition skepticism.

latest.title: Why the World Cup half-time show may be a taste of things to come
latest.summary: The World Cup final will feature a half-time show for the first time, with performances from major artists like Madonna and Shakira. This extended break will last up to 25 minutes, exceeding the standard 15-minute stoppage time.
latest.details: The World Cup final will feature a half-time show for the first time, with performances from major artists like Madonna and Shakira. This extended break will last up to 25 minutes, exceeding the standard 15-minute stoppage time. The event is being described as a landmark celebration by FIFA, merging sports and music. There is speculation about whether this trend will continue in future sporting events.
latest.full_brief: The World Cup final will feature a half-time show for the first time, with performances from major artists like Madonna and Shakira. This extended break will last up to 25 minutes, exceeding the standard 15-minute stoppage time. The event is being described as a landmark celebration by FIFA, merging sports and music. There is speculation about whether this trend will continue in future sporting events.

latest.title: The hidden cost of the night shift and how to sleep it off
latest.summary: Shift work can disrupt the body's internal clock, leading to various health issues such as heart attacks and mental illness. Scientists are exploring whether changing sleep patterns can help mitigate the negative effects of night shifts.
latest.details: Shift work can disrupt the body's internal clock, leading to various health issues such as heart attacks and mental illness. Scientists are exploring whether changing sleep patterns can help mitigate the negative effects of night shifts. Research suggests that splitting sleep into two blocks may be more effective for night workers than trying to sleep for one long stretch. Sleep is crucial for memory consolidation and overall health, highlighting the importance of addressing the challenges faced by shift workers.
latest.full_brief: Shift work can disrupt the body's internal clock, leading to various health issues such as heart attacks and mental illness. Scientists are exploring whether changing sleep patterns can help mitigate the negative effects of night shifts. Research suggests that splitting sleep into two blocks may be more effective for night workers than trying to sleep for one long stretch. Sleep is crucial for memory consolidation and overall health, highlighting the importance of addressing the challenges faced by shift workers.

latest.title: Private jets flock to Montana - but locals can't afford the trailer park
latest.summary: Bozeman, Montana, has seen a population increase of about 20% since the pandemic, driven by an influx of new residents. This growth has led to a significant rise in housing prices, making it difficult for locals to afford living in the area.
latest.details: Bozeman, Montana, has seen a population increase of about 20% since the pandemic, driven by an influx of new residents. This growth has led to a significant rise in housing prices, making it difficult for locals to afford living in the area. The phenomenon has been partly attributed to the 'Yellowstone Effect,' where the popular TV show has drawn attention to the region. Local leaders are concerned about the socioeconomic divide that is emerging as a result of these changes.
latest.full_brief: Bozeman, Montana, has seen a population increase of about 20% since the pandemic, driven by an influx of new residents. This growth has led to a significant rise in housing prices, making it difficult for locals to afford living in the area. The phenomenon has been partly attributed to the 'Yellowstone Effect,' where the popular TV show has drawn attention to the region. Local leaders are concerned about the socioeconomic divide that is emerging as a result of these changes.

latest.title: The grueling, 630-mile road race where the only fuel is sunlight
latest.summary: The Solar Car Challenge, celebrating its 30th anniversary, is a competition for high school students to design and build solar-powered cars. This year's race will cover 630 miles across Texas, starting from Fort Worth.
latest.details: The Solar Car Challenge, celebrating its 30th anniversary, is a competition for high school students to design and build solar-powered cars. This year's race will cover 630 miles across Texas, starting from Fort Worth. Students use off-the-shelf parts and 3D printed materials to create their vehicles. The challenge aims to teach participants valuable skills in project management, budgeting, and engineering.
latest.full_brief: The Solar Car Challenge, celebrating its 30th anniversary, is a competition for high school students to design and build solar-powered cars. This year's race will cover 630 miles across Texas, starting from Fort Worth. Students use off-the-shelf parts and 3D printed materials to create their vehicles. The challenge aims to teach participants valuable skills in project management, budgeting, and engineering.

latest.title: Perseid meteors to light up night sky in one of the year's most active showers
latest.summary: The Perseid meteor shower is one of the brightest and fastest meteor showers of the year. It occurs when Earth passes through the debris of Comet 109P/Swift-Tuttle.
latest.details: The Perseid meteor shower is one of the brightest and fastest meteor showers of the year. It occurs when Earth passes through the debris of Comet 109P/Swift-Tuttle. The shower will peak overnight on the 12-13 August, coinciding with the new Moon for ideal viewing conditions. During its peak, up to 150 meteors per hour can be visible.
latest.full_brief: The Perseid meteor shower is one of the brightest and fastest meteor showers of the year. It occurs when Earth passes through the debris of Comet 109P/Swift-Tuttle. The shower will peak overnight on the 12-13 August, coinciding with the new Moon for ideal viewing conditions. During its peak, up to 150 meteors per hour can be visible.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
